sys_script_include.name: ENAMSAjaxProcessor

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_d72ed346c3b50f94d7a5b8ddd40131ea
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_1958816_enterp_0.ENAMSAjaxProcessor</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>ENAMSAjaxProcessor</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var ENAMSAjaxProcessor = Class.create();
ENAMSAjaxProcessor.prototype = Object.extendsObject(AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

    getRequesterUserName: function() {

        var userSysId = this.getParameter('sysparm_user');

        var user = new GlideRecord('sys_user');

        if (user.get(userSysId)) {
            return user.user_name.toString();
        }

        return '';

    },

    type: 'ENAMSAjaxProcessor'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-02 10:30:02</sys_created_on><sys_id>d72ed346c3b50f94d7a5b8ddd40131ea</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>ENAMSAjaxProcessor</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Enterprise Network Access Management System" source="x_1958816_enterp_0">6f1e8e10c3f18f54d7a5b8ddd40131ad</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Enterprise Network Access Management System">6f1e8e10c3f18f54d7a5b8ddd40131ad</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_d72ed346c3b50f94d7a5b8ddd40131ea</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-02 10:32:26</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
